description: Black and white photograph formatted as a social-media news card. A woman in a blazer and necklace wears safety glasses and a white hard hat stenciled 'SECRETARY' and 'L. CHAVEZ' with a Department of Labor seal decal. She leans toward a younger man on her right, who wears a white hard hat labeled 'ZACK KENDALL', a dark t-shirt with a Department of Labor seal patch, and has forearm tattoos. Both look down at a handheld device in an indoor shop setting with blurred background lights. A large embossed Department of Labor eagle and shield seal watermark sits in the lower-right corner. In the lower-left, a blue label box reads 'Labor News' in white serif italic next to three vertical bars. Below, in large white serif type: 'US Department of Labor announces $145M in funds supporting performance-based Registered Apprenticeship expansion across key industry sectors.'
notable_text: Labor News; US Department of Labor announces $145M in funds supporting performance-based Registered Apprenticeship expansion across key industry sectors; SECRETARY L. CHAVEZ; ZACK KENDALL
